zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Downes於1369年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親William de Downes18歲，母親Alice Prestbury24歲。她和John II Findern ,The Elder,至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1469年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Downes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Downs
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Downes  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Downes was born in 1369, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Downes, was 18 and her mother, Alice Prestbury, was 24. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with John II Findern ,The Elder,. She died in 1469, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Downes est née en 1369, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Downes, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alice Prestbury, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec John II Findern ,The Elder,. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Downes 1369 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Downes 18 und ihre Mutter Alice Prestbury 24. ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Downesが1369年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Downesは18歳，母Alice Prestburyは24歳であった。彼女はJohn II Findern ,The Elder,との間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1469年にフランスピカーディソンメで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Downes(이)가 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Downes(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Prestbury(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 John II Findern ,The Elder,(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Downes родилась в 1369 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Downes было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Prestbury, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от John II Findern ,The Elder,. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 100 лет.
